title: Senior Financial Analyst - KPMG India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - KPMG India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
KPMG India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KPMG India:
KPMG India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPMG India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
